_comment: Maps each pipeline phase to the exact ## sections it needs from each MD artifact. Use scripts/extract-sections.py to extract. Section names must match the ## header text exactly (case-sensitive). '*' means extract the full file. Fallback: if a section is missing, warn and read the full file.
_rationale: MD section extraction is preferred over JSON conversion. LLMs read Markdown natively; section headers make precise extraction straightforward; no intermediate JSON files are needed. Token savings come from passing only the required sections rather than full documents.
_path_rule: All artifact paths MUST be constructed from md_base_path or state_base_path. $PROJECT_ROOT is the workspace root — the directory containing claude-master-plugin/ as a direct subdirectory, resolved by walking up from CWD at pipeline startup (never pwd directly). Replace <ticket> with the actual ticket ID at runtime. Never hardcode bare relative paths like docs/artifacts/ — always use these base path keys.

Ph3b_qa_test_plan._description: QA test generation phase (sdlc-qa-test-generation skill). Runs in parallel with Ph3 design-review for Large Feature, or sequentially after architecture for Small Feature. Reads ph1 + ph2; writes ph3b_qa_test_plan.md plus state files .state/qa_jira_issues.json and .state/qa_automation.json.

Ph4_impl_planning._note_ph3b_optional: ph3b_qa_test_plan.md is only present when the phase set includes qa-test-generation (Small Feature, Large Feature). If absent, Ph4 proceeds without it.

Ph5_implementation._note: Ph5 reads ph4_implementation_plan.md in full — it is already a concise, self-contained plan. No section extraction needed.

Ph7_test_engineer._note_ph3b_optional: When ph3b_qa_test_plan.md exists, Phase 7 test-engineer reconciles implemented tests against the AC→Test matrix. If absent, the existing Phase 7 logic runs unchanged.

Ph8_verification._note_artifact_digest: artifact-digest.md is read in full directly (not via extract-sections.py) from state_base_path

Ph9_risk._note_artifact_digest: artifact-digest.md is read in full directly (not via extract-sections.py) from state_base_path

Ph10_pr_creation._note: Ph10 primarily uses git diff and commit history. Manifest sections supplement PR description only.
